build_focus.primary_goal: AI-assisted job search and application: scrape postings, score against skill profiles using local LLMs, track in CSV, automate form filling, integrate with badgr_harness via MCP and RAG.
secondary_goals: Local-first LLM — Ollama handles all parse, score, browser automation. Cloud last-resort only.
Tiered scraping fallback: local Playwright → Firecrawl self-hosted → Firecrawl cloud → BrowserUse → Agenty.
Jobs indexed into ChromaDB job_opportunities collection in badgr_harness RAG.
MCP stdio server exposes job tools to Claude in badgr_harness sessions.
Production-ready: package structure, config-driven, cron-schedulable, logged.

environment.hardware: AMD Ryzen 5 5500, 16GB RAM, AMD RX 6500 XT (GPU not used for inference)
ollama_models_available: qwen2.5:14b (9.0GB) — DO NOT USE for pipeline (too large for 16GB RAM)
environment.cpu_inference_notes: mistral:7b: ~6s load, ~78s parse (2000 chars), ~26s score. Total pipeline ~107s. Do NOT run qwen2.5:14b in pipeline — 300s+ timeout on CPU with 6000-char prompts.

scrapers.purpose: Multi-tiered scraping with automatic fallback. Tier order per site in config/sites.yaml.

parsers.purpose: LLM extraction (2000-char snippet) with regex fallback. SHA-256 stable job IDs.

llm.purpose: Async Ollama wrapper, fit scoring, resume/cover letter generation.

pipeline.purpose: Orchestration: runner.py is the main pipeline. collector.py builds search URLs. scheduler.py is cron-ready.

storage.purpose: 50-field CRM CSV. Dedup by job_id. Workflow status tracking.

cli.purpose: Entry: collect-score, apply, query, list, run-daily.

files.sites.yaml: 11 job sites with per-site scraping strategy tiers and credential keys
files.providers.yaml: Scraping tier order, Ollama config (mistral:7b), API quotas
files.skills.yaml: 9 skill profiles: ai-sw-engineer (primary), python-automation, full-stack-dev, ai-agents, devops-mlops, field-support-engineer, tech-support, federal-contracts, workmarket-contractor
files.identity.yaml: LOCAL ONLY — gitignored. Full identity, business data, platform credentials. Do not read or commit.

integration_modules.mcp_server.py: MCP stdio JSON-RPC server. Tools: job_search, job_query, job_apply, list_jobs, ingest_jobs_to_rag.
integration_modules.rag_bridge.py: Feeds jobs into badgr_harness ChromaDB. Collection: job_opportunities. Separate from badgr_corpus.
integration_modules.form_filler.py: BrowserUse + ChatOllama. Always dry_run=True by default. Pass dry_run=False to submit.

config_read_pattern.warning: CRITICAL — do not regress this fix.
config_read_pattern.bug_history: providers.yaml top-level key is 'providers', so yaml.safe_load returns {'providers': {...}}. configs['providers'] = this dict. prov.get('llm', {}) = {} because the key is 'providers', not 'llm'.

job_sites.workmarket_note: PRIMARY contractor platform. Requires browseruse with stored credentials from identity.yaml.
job_sites.indeed_note: Two accounts: proton.me (USER1) and gmail (USER2 with pre-configured remote/tech search).

badgr_harness_integration.rag_collection_count: 1 doc (as of 2026-04-26, grows with each pipeline run)
badgr_harness_integration.badgr_corpus_count: 2087 docs (AI/tech reference corpus, do not modify)

worker_delegation.claude: Architecture decisions, integration correctness, final verification
worker_delegation.mistral:7b: Job parsing (2000-char), fit scoring, documentation prose
worker_delegation.llama3.2:latest: BrowserUse LLM driver for authenticated scraping
worker_delegation.qwen2.5-coder:7b: Code generation tasks if needed (not in pipeline)
worker_delegation.AVOID qwen2.5:14b: Too large for 16GB RAM — 300s+ timeouts on any substantial prompt

current_state.build_status: working — first successful E2E run completed 2026-04-26

known_issues.description: identity.yaml CAGE code is empty string. CAGE code not yet obtained.
known_issues.resolution: Register on SAM.gov, obtain CAGE, update config/identity.yaml cage_code field.

known_issues.description: Firecrawl self-hosted (localhost:3002) not deployed. Tier skipped gracefully.
known_issues.resolution: Deploy via docker-compose from github.com/mendableai/firecrawl (not single image pull — requires docker-compose.yaml).

known_issues.description: FIRECRAWL_API_KEY and AGENTY_API_KEY not set. Cloud tiers fail gracefully.
known_issues.resolution: Set env vars or inject into providers.yaml directly.

known_issues.description: WorkMarket, LinkedIn, ZipRecruiter, Indeed require authenticated browser sessions. BrowserUse not yet tested with login flows.
known_issues.resolution: Test browseruse tier with stored credentials from identity.yaml. May need session cookie persistence.

known_issues.description: ZipRecruiter and Indeed (gmail) use Google auth — password not stored, must use saved browser session.
known_issues.resolution: Use browseruse with a pre-logged-in Chromium profile, or set up session cookie persistence.

known_issues.description: Ollama request queue: killing Python mid-run leaves orphaned in-flight requests that block subsequent calls.
known_issues.resolution: Force-unload models via keep_alive:0 API call. If stuck, restart Ollama service (requires sudo).

next_steps.action: Run daily collection across primary profiles

next_steps.notes: BrowserUse tier with workmarket credentials from identity.yaml. Verify job listings are scraped and scored.

next_steps.action: Set up cron for daily automated runs

next_steps.notes: Clone github.com/mendableai/firecrawl, run docker-compose up. Enables faster Tier 1 scraping.

next_steps.action: Test MCP server from badgr_harness Claude session
next_steps.notes: Open Claude Code in badgr_harness. .mcp.json registers pro-hunter automatically. Use job_search, job_query tools.

next_steps.action: Obtain CAGE code and update identity.yaml
next_steps.notes: SAM.gov registration. Required for federal contract bidding under BADGRTechnologies LLC.

quick_commands.check_queue: curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/ps | python3 -c "import sys,json; [print(m['name']) for m in json.load(sys.stdin).get('models',[])]"
